hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq "(^|[[:space:]])AWS_PROFILE=(admin|stage|staging|prod|production)([[:space:]]|$)|--profile[[:space:]]+(admin|stage|staging|prod|production)\b"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Banned AWS profile (admin / stage / prod). Confirm before any command runs against high-blast-radius credentials.\"}}"; fi'
